description:
Recto: Fragment from a Judaeo-Arabic deed of sale for a property, describing its boundaries and including a partial date. Mentions the name Abū l-Qāsim b. Abū l-Faraj as well as houses known by the names of other people. 

Verso: Possibly a letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic, with what looks like an address in Arabic script. Sent to Fusṭāṭ. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
